message:
feat(fuzz): add parser and detect fuzz corpora with tracing dependency

Fuzz Corpus:
- Add 1,651 fuzz_parse corpus seed files for parser fuzzing coverage
- Add 377 fuzz_detect corpus seed files for diagram detection fuzzing
- Seeds generated from coverage-guided fuzzing to maximize parser
  code path exploration

Dependencies:
- Add tracing dependency to fm-core via Cargo.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
